name: super-nb
description: super-nb-platform 项目专属 Claude Code marketplace:vendored 在仓库内、随 git 一起分发（单插件）

plugins.name: super-nb
plugins.description: super-nb-platform 项目专属能力 plugin：14 个工程方法论 skills（brainstorming / writing-plans / executing-plans / subagent-driven-development / dispatching-parallel-agents / test-driven-development / systematic-debugging / verification-before-completion / requesting-code-review / receiving-code-review / finishing-a-development-branch / using-git-worktrees / using-superpowers / release-planning）+ SessionStart hook，由 patra plugin 精简并按六边形架构（Java 25 / Spring Boot 4 / Gradle 9.5 多模块单体，activity + gallery 限界上下文）深度定制。
